findings.description: The interactive execution example showing actual prompts and expected output is omitted. Source includes a bash example with specific prompt messages ('[input] 処理方式名を入力して下さい。', '[input] 環境名を入力して下さい。') and 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' confirmation. This helps users verify correct tool operation.
